description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of white, black, and terracotta-colored exterior walls. The structure includes large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some with glass railings, and a spacious paved driveway leading to a garage. Surrounding the house are several trees and landscaped greenery, enhancing its urban appeal. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch area and a prominent front door. A car is parked in the driveway, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, black, and terracotta exterior walls, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing dark exterior walls, a rooftop terrace, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: The front and main facade are visible, highlighting the terracotta and white walls, large windows, and the main entryway with a covered porch.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the driveway, garage, car, and a mix of white and terracotta walls, as well as multiple balconies.
description_view_3: The opposite rear side is shown, with dark walls, a visible garage, and a tree-lined driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large door under a covered porch, with a paved approach and minimal decorative elements.
